en.extract:
The black oriole (Oriolus hosii) is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo. One of the least known of the orioles, its distribution range is restricted to Sarawak in Borneo. Along with the black-and-crimson, maroon, and silver orioles, it belongs to a clade of red and black orioles. The binomial name is after Charles Hose who collected the first specimen of the species on Mount Dulit.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests where it is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''black oriole''' ('''''Oriolus hosii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Oriolidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the island of [[Borneo]].<ref>{{cite book |title=Phillipps' Field Guide to the Birds of Borneo |author=Phillipps, Quentin |author2=  Phillipps, Karen |name-list-style= amp |year=2011 |publisher=John Beaufoy Publishing |location=Oxford, UK |isbn=978-1-906780-56-2 }}</ref> One of the least known of the orioles, its distribution range is restricted to [[Sarawak]] in Borneo.<ref>{{cite journal|author=Dickinson, E.C.|year=2004|title= Systematic notes on Asian birds. 42. A preliminary review of the Oriolidae|journal= Zool. Verh. Leiden|volume=350|pages=47–63|url=http://www.repository.naturalis.nl/record/215554}}</ref> Along with the [[Black-and-crimson oriole|black-and-crimson]], [[Maroon oriole|maroon]], and [[silver oriole]]s, it belongs to a clade of red and black orioles.<ref>{{cite journal|title=Phylogeny and biogeography of Oriolidae (Aves: Passeriformes)|author=Jønsson, K.A.|author2=Rauri C. K. Bowie|author3=Robert G. Moyle|author4=Martin Irestedt|author5=Les Christidis|author6=Janette A. Norman|author7=Jon Fjeldsa|name-list-style=amp|journal=Ecography |volume=33|pages=232–241|year= 2010|issue=2 | doi=10.1111/j.1600-0587.2010.06167.x|url=http://www.nrm.se/download/18.25ba04a21296cc434f980005871/J%25C3%25B6nsson%2Bet%2Bal%2BOriolidae.pdf|doi-access=free|bibcode=2010Ecogr..33..232J }}</ref> The [[binomial name]] is after [[Charles Hose]] who collected the first specimen of the species on [[Mount Dulit]].<ref>{{cite journal|url=https://archive.org/stream/ibis651893brit#page/380/mode/1up|title=On the Avifauna of Mount Dulit and the Baram District in the territory of Sarawak|author=Hose, Charles|pages=381–424 |year=1893|journal=Ibis|volume=35|issue=3|doi=10.1111/j.1474-919X.1893.tb01231.x}}</ref>

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical [[Borneo montane rain forests|moist montane forests]] where it is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
黑黃鸝，是黃鸝科的一種鳥類。它是婆羅洲島的特有物種。黑黃鸝是最不為人知的品種之一，其分佈範圍僅限於婆羅洲的砂拉越。
牠們自然的棲息地是亞熱帶或熱帶潮濕山區森林，最常見的海拔在1100至1200米之間，在那裡牠們受到棲息地喪失的威脅。
